articles.title: How to Create a Linux Virtual Machine on Azure (Step-by-Step for Beginners)
articles.excerpt: What is a Virtual Machine? Almost everyone has a bank app on their phone. If a bank tried to host that application on its own premises or in its own private data center, it would need to pay for cooli…
articles.body: What is a Virtual Machine? A Virtual Machine (VM) is essentially a computer that lives in the cloud instead of on your desk. A great way to understand why VMs matter is to think about a banking app. Almost everyone has a bank app on their phone. If a bank tried to host that application on its own premises or in its own private data center, it would need to pay for cooling, electricity, hardware maintenance, and a dozen other operational expenses. That gets expensive fast and it doesn't scale well. Instead, banks (and most companies today) use Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS) , which gives them full control over a virtual machine without the overhead of owning and maintaining physical hardware.
articles.author: SULIAT

articles.title: Redis Sets and Set Operations
articles.excerpt: A Redis set is an unordered collection of unique strings. Two things make it valuable: membership tests are instant, and Redis can compute intersections, unions, and differences between sets inside th…
articles.body: A Redis set is an unordered collection of unique strings. Two things make it valuable: membership tests are instant, and Redis can compute intersections, unions, and differences between sets inside the database. That turns questions like "is this user following that one," "what tags do these two articles share," and "how many unique visitors today" into single fast commands, instead of loops in your application code. This is part 6 of the Redis Masterclass, following lists and queues .
articles.author: Aman Kumar Singh

articles.title: Build a Feedback Channel That Doesn't Become Another Abandoned Inbox
articles.excerpt: A feedback channel is easy to launch: add an email address, enable GitHub Issues, or link a form. The difficult part starts after the first message arrives. Without an explicit workflow, maintainers e…
articles.body: A feedback channel is easy to launch: add an email address, enable GitHub Issues, or link a form. The difficult part starts after the first message arrives. Without an explicit workflow, maintainers end up checking several disconnected inboxes. Reporters do not know where to ask questions, private messages cannot be searched by other contributors, and issues sit in an ambiguous state until everyone assumes somebody else handled them. The solution is not another notification destination. It is a small routing and triage system with one visible entry point, clear ownership, and a limited set of states. This tutorial builds that system around GitHub, but the same model works with GitLab, a ticket tracker, or a shared support queue.
articles.author: LunarDrift

articles.title: Integrating Claude Code with Veo MCP: Generate HD AI Videos from the Terminal
articles.excerpt: When I need a short product demo or a visual explanation for a README, the slow part is rarely the idea. The slow part is leaving the terminal, opening another tool, and translating a developer task i…
articles.body: When I need a short product demo or a visual explanation for a README, the slow part is rarely the idea. The slow part is leaving the terminal, opening another tool, and translating a developer task into a video-editing workflow. This guide walks through a terminal-first setup: connecting Claude Code to the Veo MCP server so you can ask for short AI-generated videos in plain language while staying inside your project workspace. The source workflow comes from the Ace Data Cloud documentation for Claude Code + Veo MCP. Veo is described there as an AI video generation model from Google, with support for 1080p output and video generation with accompanying audio. In practice, the interesting part for builders is not just the model.
articles.author: Germey

articles.title: SQLite + Vector Search: The Dependency-Free AI Memory Stack
articles.excerpt: SQLite + Vector Search: The Dependency-Free AI Memory Stack Why are AI engineers moving from bloated vector databases to sqlite-vec? Discover how combining SQLite's legendary reliability with a zero-d…
articles.body: SQLite + Vector Search: The Dependency-Free AI Memory Stack Why are AI engineers moving from bloated vector databases to sqlite-vec? Discover how combining SQLite's legendary reliability with a zero-dependency vector extension creates the ultimate local memory for autonomous agents, with head-to-head performance benchmarks against cloud solutions. The Agent Memory Paradox: Why Your Stack is Weaker Than You Think The modern autonomous agent is a memory-intensive application. It needs to recall past conversations, retrieve relevant document snippets, and maintain context across sessions. The conventional solution? Deploy a dedicated vector database like Pinecone, Weaviate, or ChromaDB. But this introduces a critical flaw: dependency and complexity .
articles.author: Robert Pelloni

articles.title: Building an Incident Triage Agent with Full Observability in SigNoz
articles.excerpt: The problem: AI agents are black boxes AI agents chain LLM calls and tool calls together to make decisions. But For the "Agents of SigNoz" hackathon, I wanted to build something that An Incident Triag…
articles.body: The problem: AI agents are black boxes AI agents chain LLM calls and tool calls together to make decisions. But when something goes wrong — a slow response, an unexpected answer, a runaway cost — you're stuck guessing. You can't debug what you can't see. For the "Agents of SigNoz" hackathon, I wanted to build something that addresses this directly: an AI agent whose entire decision-making process is fully observable, end to end.

articles.excerpt: If you’ve ever wished you could buy one electric vehicle that could evolve with your needs instead of replacing it every time your use case changes, a Canadian company thinks it has the answer. ENVO D…
articles.body: If you’ve ever wished you could buy one electric vehicle that could evolve with your needs instead of replacing it every time your use case changes, a Canadian company thinks it has the answer. ENVO Drive Systems has unveiled its new Utility Personal Transporter (UPT), a modular electric vehicle platform that can be configured into as many as 18 different vehicle types, with even more combinations possible through optional accessories and upgrades.

articles.title: Motor City's director explains how he made the most unique revenge thriller of the year
articles.excerpt: The filmmaker discusses Alan Ritchson, visual storytelling, unforgettable needle drops, and why "the first person to speak usually loses."
articles.body: After spending nearly two decades in development, Motor City has finally reached the big screen. Starring Alan Ritchson as an ex-Army Ranger seeking revenge after being framed and sent to prison, the film tells much of its story with little dialogue, relying instead on physical performances, visual storytelling, and a soundtrack of classic rock needle drops that become as important as the characters themselves.
articles.author: Terry Terrones

articles.title: League of Legends Riftbound TCG: First Impressions of the Vendetta Booster Set | IGN Preview
articles.excerpt: Get an early look at League of Legends Riftbound's upcoming Vendetta expansion.
articles.body: The wait is finally over for Riftbound’s Vendetta booster set, as its release is now just around the corner. This will be the League of Legends TCG’s fourth big drop with pre-release events at local stores starting July 24th with the global release on July 31st. That’s right! With the game having about a year under its belt now, fans finally have a synced-up release with both English and Chinese languages for the first time. Not only is this great for the meta, but players will also have some new deck combinations to mess around with as the set introduces new legends with opposing colors or domains and, of course, new mechanics like Flow to give some extra options out of hand.

articles.title: House of the Dragon Larys Strong Actor Matthew Needham Voices Joker in Batman: Caped Crusader Season 2 | Comic Con 2026
articles.excerpt: Matthew Needham is the voice of The Joker in Batman: Caped Crusader Season 2, Prime Video has announced. British actor Needham is most famous for playing Larys Strong in Game of Thrones prequel series…
articles.body: Matthew Needham is the voice of The Joker in Batman: Caped Crusader Season 2, Prime Video has announced. British actor Needham is most famous for playing Larys Strong in Game of Thrones prequel series House of the Dragon. Confirmation comes from the Batman: Caped Crusader Season 2 panel at San Diego Comic-Con, which ended with a trailer for Amazon’s upcoming Batman: Caped Crusader - Chronicles game . It’s exclusive to Amazon Luna (and now, part of Amazon Prime ), and launches alongside all 10 episodes of Season 2 on July 31. Batman: Caped Crusader is a superhero noir animated series created by Bruce Timm (co-creator of Batman: The Animated Series), The Batman director Matt Reeves, and J.J. Abrams.
articles.author: Wesley Yin-Poole

articles.title: Amazon Prime Has an Exclusive Batman Video Game Set to Launch Alongside Batman: Caped Crusader Season 2 | Comic Con 2026
articles.excerpt: Amazon and Warner Bros. have announced Batman: Caped Crusader - Chronicles, a new Batman game exclusive to Amazon Prime set to launch on July 31 alongside Batman: Caped Crusader Season 2.
articles.body: Amazon and Warner Bros. have announced Batman: Caped Crusader - Chronicles, a new Batman game exclusive to Amazon Prime set to launch on July 31 alongside Batman: Caped Crusader Season 2 . Both the game and the new season of the animated show will be available for Amazon Prime members at no additional cost. The game is part of Amazon Luna’s move into Prime Video, which launched today ahead of the Batman: Caped Crusader Season 2 panel at San Diego Comic-Con. Batman: Caped Crusader - Chronicles is a cooperative crime-solving party game for up to four players. The idea is that people will watch Batman: Caped Crusader Season 2 then play the game, using their phones as controllers.
articles.author: Wesley Yin-Poole

articles.excerpt: Up to 175 inches of easily transfortable screen for your Steam Deck, Nintendo Switch 2, or Xbox Ally X.
articles.body: XR glasses – glasses that project a virtual screen that no one else can see in front of you – are a kind of gadget that's both cool and practical, but few people actually own. A major reason for that is cost. The technology isn't cheap, and a pair could run you hundreds of dollars. Fortunately, there's a good sale going on right now. For a limited time, VITURE, one of the major XR glasses brands here in the US, is offering an extra 15% off its entire lineup of refurbished XR/AR glasses through its official eBay storefront with coupon code " REFURBLOVE ". These refurbished glasses also get an extended 2 year Allstate warranty.

articles.excerpt: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms is using unreleased George R.R. Martin "canon" pages while the Game of Thrones author struggles with Winds of Winter
articles.body: It's been six years since Game of Thrones writer George R.R. Martin last graced the world with a new book or novella. The fantasy writer likes to periodically remind the public that the beleaguered Winds of Winter is making some kind of progress, sure . The whole thing has been such a saga, though, that some fans are losing hope Martin will ever publish something again. The good news is that Martin is writing something that isn't a TV show. Whether the specifics will actually make fans happy is a different story.

articles.title: Google welcomes Walmart’s latest super-affordable Onn cameras to the Home family
articles.excerpt: Keep an eye on your property for a whole lot less than Nest hardware.
articles.body: TL;DR Walmart’s got two new Onn cameras ready for use with Google Home and Gemini. The Outdoor Camera Plug-In offers weather resistance, two-way audio, and color night vision for under $35. If you need even more light, the Outdoor Floodlight Camera Hardwired adds a 2,500 lumen floodlight for $77. Picking the right hardware for your smart home be positively nerve-wracking. Cheap out, and you risk getting some barely functional crap that won’t even play nicely with the rest of your setup. But nobody wants to pay too much, either, and feel like they’ve been taken advantage of. That’s one of the reasons we’re fans of Walmart’s Onn brand , which feels like it delivers real value combined with the Google support we demand.

articles.title: Google Home’s latest update tackles one of voice control’s biggest annoyances
articles.excerpt: A longer conversational memory window for Gemini should mean repeating yourself less.
articles.body: TL;DR A fresh Google Home update means Gemini for Home can now keep track of a conversation for up to 15 minutes. The Google Home app is also getting clearer automation guidance and smarter controls for blinds. The Nest camera part of the update brings reliability improvements and fixes for Activity Zones and settings. Smart speakers are supposed to make controlling your home feel effortless, but that illusion quickly falls apart when you have to repeat yourself. The latest Google Home update aims to address this issue by giving Gemini for Home a longer conversational memory, alongside a batch of other updates covering automations, smart locks, cameras, and the Google Home app itself.

articles.title: Vulcan Centaur swapped out again: NASA goes with SpaceX Falcon Heavy rocket for launch of space weather mission
articles.excerpt: NASA's SunRISE mission has been assigned a new launch vehicle: It will now be delivered to orbit by a SpaceX Falcon Heavy rocket rather than a United Launch Alliance Vulcan Centaur.
articles.body: NASA is shaking things up for its next mission to research the sun. The six satellites of NASA's Sun Radio Interferometer Space Experiment (SunRISE) mission are poised to launch to Earth orbit soon, to serve as an early warning system for incoming solar storms. They were originally slated to lift off on a United Launch Alliance (ULA) Vulcan Centaur rocket but have now been assigned a SpaceX Falcon Heavy , according to a NASA mission update . SunRISE will fly to space as part of a rideshare mission sponsored by the U.S. Space Force's (USSF's) Space Systems Command (SSC). Though it's not stated specifically in the NASA release, that may be a hint as to why the mission's rocket was changed.
articles.author: Josh Dinner

articles.title: 'Star Trek: Strange New Worlds' Season 4: Release date & how to watch Paramount+’s sensational sci-fi series
articles.excerpt: 'We've seen a lot of strange new worlds, but we’ll never see something like this again'
articles.body: 2026 is the 60th anniversary of "Star Trek". To help celebrate the show that creator Gene Roddenberry described as "Wagon Train to the Stars,""Star Trek: Strange New Worlds" returns to Paramount+ for its penultimate season. From teasers and trailers that first dropped last summer and fall, we’re anticipating a rollicking batch of dynamic episodes that draw on diverse subgenres, with everything from classic film noir crime stories and time travel to spooky ghost stories and sword-clashing swashbucklers. But the end is nigh for this colorful modern interpretation of "Trek". Next year's truncated fifth season will be the crew's final mission, so let's revel in the time we have left and beam onto the Enterprise bridge for a promising round of missions.
articles.author: Jeff Spry

articles.title: Scientists may have finally solved the mystery of the sun's missing silver
articles.excerpt: Scientists say the sun has a little more silver than we thought.
articles.body: For several years now, astronomers who study the sun have faced a little mystery — our star seemed to hold too little silver. Whenever scientists examined the sun's outer layers, they've seen significantly less silver than they've expected to find. Where, then, did the missing silver go? As it turns out, this mystery may finally be solved. Newly published research suggests that the sun 's missing silver may have been hiding in plain sight all along. At first, the real mystery might seem to be why you'd seek silver in the sun at all. After all, 98.5% of the sun's mass is made from lightweight hydrogen and helium. Silver is just a tiny fraction of the remaining 1.5%, which also includes traces of other heavy elements like iron and copper.
articles.author: Rahul Rao

articles.title: Russian Espionage Group Exploited Zimbra Zero-Day to Steal Mail and 2FA Codes
articles.excerpt: A Russian state-supported espionage group spent months reading Western mailboxes through a then-unknown flaw in Zimbra's webmail client. The payload goes after the last 90 days of email, the organizat…
articles.body: A Russian state-supported espionage group spent months reading Western mailboxes through a then-unknown flaw in Zimbra's webmail client. The payload goes after the last 90 days of email, the organization's entire email directory, the password saved in the browser and the codes kept for two-factor recovery. Opening the message was enough to start it. The NSA, CISA and partner agencies published
articles.author: info@thehackernews.com (The Hacker News)

articles.title: How much better is the Canon EOS R6 III than previous models for astrophotography?
articles.excerpt: The latest edition of the Canon EOS R6 III adds 8 MP in resolution compared to the EOS R6 II, a CFexpress card slot and improved low-light autofocusing capability but do these upgrades actually benefi…
articles.body: In a rare first for me, I actually used autofocus for this entire astrophotography shoot. If I'm being honest? I prefer it when shooting astro with a mirrorless camera . Why? Because it is quicker and that means more time capturing the stars and less time setting up. I can get a star in sharp focus using autofocus in half the time that it would take me to do it manually and it's way easier to focus with the shutter or back button than play about with the focus ring, especially with cold fingers. The Canon EOS R6 III makes shooting astro much quicker with its rapid low-light autofocus.
